CREATE TABLE bit_strings (id INTEGER, bit_data BITSTRING);
SELECT ~bit_data FROM bit_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM bit_strings WHERE id > 1);
SELECT id, ~bit_data AS negated_bits FROM bit_strings;
SELECT b.id, ~b.bit_data AS negated_bits FROM bit_strings b JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM bit_strings WHERE id < 3) AS sub ON b.id = sub.id;
WITH negated AS (SELECT ~bit_data AS neg_bits FROM bit_strings) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM negated WHERE neg_bits IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (info INTEGER, bit_data2 BITSTRING);
SELECT a.info, ~b.bit_data2 FROM additional_data a JOIN bit_strings b ON a.info = b.id;
SELECT a.info, b.id, ~a.bit_data2 AS negated_second_bits, ~b.bit_data AS negated_first_bits FROM additional_data a JOIN bit_strings b ON a.info = b.id WHERE ~b.bit_data = '010'::BITSTRING;
SELECT b.id, b.bit_data, (SELECT ~bit_data2 FROM additional_data WHERE info = b.id) AS negated_from_additional FROM bit_strings b;
